texto: The English of the Bible has a pithiness and raciness a homely tang a terse sententiousness an idiomatic flavour which comes home to men's business and bosoms ... a nobility of diction and ... a rhythmic quality . . . unrivaled in its beauty.
explicacao: Citação de John Livingston Lowes sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The English of the Bible has a pithiness and raciness a homely tang a terse sententiousness an id…” articula reflexao, bible, english em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
